diagrams.title: GAN Architecture Overview
diagrams.description: Shows the basic GAN structure with Generator and Discriminator networks
diagrams.purpose: Understand the adversarial framework and data flow between Generator and Discriminator

diagrams.title: GAN Training Process Flowchart
diagrams.description: Illustrates the step-by-step training procedure of GANs
diagrams.purpose: Visualize the alternating training steps and optimization process

diagrams.title: DCGAN Generator Architecture
diagrams.description: Shows the detailed architecture of DCGAN Generator for image generation
diagrams.purpose: Understand how noise is progressively upsampled to generate images using convolutions

diagrams.title: Mode Collapse Visualization
diagrams.description: Demonstrates the mode collapse problem in GANs
diagrams.purpose: Illustrate the mode collapse problem where Generator fails to capture full data distribution
